name: msg2agent
description: Trustless cross-org agent network with W3C DID identity. Discover agents, send messages, delegate A2A tasks — securely across organizational boundaries without shared keys or central authorities.

skills.name: Agent Discovery
skills.description: Discover agents on the relay network by DID or capability. Returns agent cards with endpoints and supported methods.
examples: List all agents with the 'summarize' capability

skills.name: Secure Messaging
skills.description: Send end-to-end encrypted, signed JSON-RPC messages to any agent identified by DID. Supports fire-and-forget and request-response patterns.
examples: Send a summarize request to did:wba:acme.com:agent:summarizer
Delegate a data extraction task to a remote agent

skills.name: Task Orchestration
skills.description: Submit, track, cancel, and stream A2A tasks across agents. Supports sessions, multi-turn interactions, and input-required states.
examples: Submit a multi-step research task to an agent and stream progress
Resume an existing session with a remote agent

skills.name: Inbox Management
skills.description: Read, manage, and delete incoming messages from other agents. Supports offline delivery via store-and-forward queue.
examples: Check for new messages from other agents

oauth2.description: Google OAuth 2.0 (OpenID Connect) for Gemini Enterprise

apiKey.description: Bearer API key (msg2a_ prefix) issued via the msg2agent billing dashboard
apiKey.name: Authorization
